title: Healthy window — produce No-Finding report with full Execution Status
scenario: User asks 'is anything wrong?' for a 1-hour window where everything is healthy. error_ratio < 0.001%, no new error classes, no spikes vs baselines.
expected_finding: Skill must produce a No-Finding report that explicitly says 'No actionable findings in window.' AND includes Execution Status with what was scanned, statistical context, and coverage gaps. A 'no findings' report without Execution Status is a contract violation.
